metadata.description: Control Apple Music from Claude Code. Natural-language control, a CLI, and an interactive TUI for playback, AirPlay speakers, playlists, and discovery.

plugins.name: music
plugins.description: Control Apple Music from Claude Code. Natural-language control (the /music skill), a CLI, and an interactive TUI for playback, AirPlay speakers, playlists, and discovery; transport stays on your media keys. One-command CLI build; Apple Developer auth is only needed for catalog search, library, and discovery features.
